description: Create a standard aviation Instrument Approach Procedure (IAP) 'Profile View' diagram for the KSFO (San Francisco Intl) ILS RWY 28R approach using the data provided in '~/Desktop/iap_data.txt'. The diagram must include a schematic side-view of the approach path with fixes ARCHI, DUMBA, and RWY 28R plotted at correct relative vertical positions. The path should show a level flight segment from ARCHI to DUMBA and a descending glideslope from DUMBA to the runway. Label fixes with their names and underlined mandatory altitudes. Include a dashed upward-curving arrow for the Missed Approach and the ILS frequency '111.7' in a box. Save the source file to '~/Diagrams/ksfo_ils_28r_profile.drawio' and export the final diagram as a PDF to '~/Diagrams/ksfo_ils_28r_profile.pdf'.
